purpose: Preserve high-value insights from chats, annotations, stale PRs, runtime notes, and toolchain research without treating every stale snapshot as current truth.
allowedScope: capturing user annotations, sprint summaries, PR comments, and stale snapshots as repo-owned doctrine candidates
classifying each insight as current truth, stale-but-useful principle, replay candidate, rejected artifact, or needs-runtime-proof
linking insights to executable contracts, skills, validators, PRs, artifacts, or exact next commands
turning recurring insights into workflow contracts, skills, relay packets, retention policies, or validation gates
recording closeout order for PRs, branches, comments, evidence bundles, and future harness work
forbiddenScope: treating stale chat text or stale PR bodies as current repo truth without verification
closing PRs, deleting branches, deleting worktrees, or deleting evidence without replacement, archive manifest, or rejection rationale
claiming runtime proof from documentation, static validators, stale evidence, or operator memory
demanding human-only proof when an agent-verifiable local harness path can be built and authorized
moving domain behavior into harness solely to preserve an idea or chase a percentage

insightClasses.meaning: Matches current source, contracts, PR state, or fresh artifacts.
Old snapshot may be inaccurate, but the design principle should be preserved and revalidated.
A stale PR, branch, hunk, script, test, or doc contains value that should be selectively replayed onto a safe base.
Cannot be closed or merged by static evidence alone; requires an agent-run local proof path with exact-head artifacts.
The idea is obsolete, unsafe, or already replaced; preserve rationale before cleanup.

orderedSteps.name: capture_source
requiredEvidence: source text, file, PR number, branch, artifact path, or comment link

orderedSteps.name: classify_freshness
requiredEvidence: current_truth, stale_but_useful_principle, replay_candidate, needs_runtime_proof, or rejected_or_superseded

orderedSteps.name: route_to_lane
requiredEvidence: skill or workflow that owns the next move

orderedSteps.name: commit_repo_memory
requiredEvidence: architecture doc, handoff doc, workflow contract, skill, validator, or PR body updated
source provenance retained without embedding huge logs or generated evidence

orderedSteps.name: close_loop
requiredEvidence: validation command results or exact skipped commands

requires: each insight classified by freshness and utility
stale PR and evidence cleanup tied to replacement or archive rationale
agent-verifiable runtime proof path preferred over human-only gates where feasible
git diff --check passes or exact local blocker is recorded
